item.title: Families Need Support Before and After Celiac Diagnoses
item.description: Families’ reports of initial emotional distress were mitigated with education and access to resources. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Sleep Disorders Very Common in Patients With Osteoarthritis
item.description: While pain is recognized as a likely contributor to poor sleep, the relationship may be bidirectional, with sleep problems also contributing to osteoa...

item.title: Low BMI Linked to Higher Mortality in Older Adults With T2D
item.description: Diabetes management often emphasizes the importance of weight loss, but this study suggests that thinner isn’t always better when it comes to older ad...

item.title: Sirolimus-Eluting Balloon Shows Promise in ACS
item.description: Relative to routine stenting, drug-eluting balloon revascularization with as-needed stenting produced similarly low target lesion failure rates in pat...
